subject: Video of the day: ICE agents capture criminal fugitives
body:
U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, through its Operation Cross Check,recently apprehended 605 criminals—illegal aliens convicted of... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=efb60b5588&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 23, 2019
---
| | |
# Video of the day: ICE agents capture criminal fugitives
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5778ca7733&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement** recently apprehended 605 criminals—illegal aliens convicted of theft, weapons possession, assault, domestic violence, strangulation, drunk driving, and drug dealing—through its Operation Cross Check.

**ICE also announced** today that nearly 3,300 employers have been targeted for inspection of worksite immigration violations in all 50 states, as well as Puerto Rico. These actions put corporations on notice: Anyone who exploits illegal workers to break Federal laws on wages, child labor, and health and safety will be held accountable.

**These actions** are crucial for upholding the rule of law, but ICE’s work would be much easier, safer, and more effective if the problems with America’s broken immigration system were addressed head-on by Congress. Where gaps exist—both literally in the form of inadequate border security and figuratively in the form of asylum loopholes—the most vulnerable always pay the price.

**The list of victims** grows each day: migrants exploited and often assaulted by human smugglers; children kidnapped or sold into horrific trafficking rings; American citizens victimized in communities where crime has spilled across the border; and law enforcement officers struggling each day to maintain order despite inadequate resources.

**America can do better**. And it must.

[Behind the scenes: ICE Operation apprehends criminals in California](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f79ef6a8d8&e=3ee4985eea)

**Gallup:** [Mentions of Immigration as Top Problem Surpass Record High](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06fdfdf4dd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Meet America’s new Secretary of Defense, Mark Esper**

**In the Oval Office** this afternoon**,** President Donald J. Trump participated in the swearing-in ceremony for his new Secretary of Defense. Dr. Mark Esper was overwhelmingly confirmed by the Senate earlier today in a 90-8 vote.

**Dr. Esper’s** **life** has been marked by a devotion to America’s safety and security, making his nomination an easy decision for President Trump. The call to service began early on in Esper’s career, from his days at West Point to deployment with the “Screaming Eagles” in the Gulf War.

**He served our nation** in uniform for more than two decades in total, with 10 years on active duty in the Army and 11 years in the National Guard and Army Reserve.

**Prior to his nomination** , Esper built a career with leadership positions that gave him a deep understanding of our national security needs. With key roles in the Defense Department, on Capitol Hill, and in the private sector, Esper is without a doubt one of the most capable people in America to execute the President’s National Defense Strategy.

**With Esper,** our servicemen and women will have someone uniquely qualified to ensure they have all the resources needed to do their jobs. In his new role, Esper will prioritize both defense modernization and accountability to U.S. taxpayers through tough budget decisions.

**Most important** , he wants to make sure that America’s military members receive the respect and consideration they deserve.

**“I am truly honored** to be part of the greatest military in the world,” he said.

[Vice President Mike Pence: “Mark Esper is a fierce defender of our country.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=efba12c7b1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **Secretary of Defense Mark Esper is sworn-in by United States Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito in the Oval Office** | July 23, 2019
---

name: Cory Booker
subject: Two big things happening next week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, in a few moments, I am going to ask you to [_**chip in to my campaign for president**_](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190723-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190723_CB_20190723-fr-CB-eom1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer="). Here's why: **We close the books on July just a couple of hours after I step off the debate stage next week. And where we land at the end of this month in terms of fundraising will decide a lot about our future.** Our budget will help determine if we can hire more people on the ground in key early states, reach more folks with an unapologetically bold message for our country's future, and recruit more first-time donors to ensure my spot in future debates. Look, I know that we're not the frontrunner in this race. That means that, unlike some other candidates, we can't rake in millions of dollars in one day. I'm not a billionaire able to pour my own money into this thing. And our campaign is refusing to take donations from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, and pharma and oil company executives. That doesn't make me a favorite of some of the D.C. insiders but it does explain why these fundraising deadlines matter more for a campaign like ours. [_**So I 'm asking you personally, can you chip in before the big fundraising deadline at the end of this month and help us build this campaign into an undeniable force?**_](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190723-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190723_CB_20190723-fr-CB-eom1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Your support means the world to me. Thank you, Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190723-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190723_CB_20190723-fr-CB-eom1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084a/5fca0d19/dcf4491/29186b00/3083952652/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084a/5fca0d19/dcf4491/29186b04/3083952652/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: The people of Montana are no fools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
Last night, I appeared live on MSNBC for an interview with Lawrence O'Donnell.
I told Lawrence that right now, the people of Montana only have one Senator fighting for them in Washington, D.C. because Steve Daines has decided to join the executive branch. When Daines votes to take away health care from millions and refuses to address critical issues like climate change, he is not representing the people of Montana. He's shortchanging us instead.
The people of Montana are no fools. They know who will stand up and fight for them. I am running to replace Steve Daines and be that champion for the people in the U.S. Senate.
**Watch the clip, then help grow our campaign by sharing it with your friends and family.**
**[](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561647ae/1e3760f0/69fd687c/5f7e9a9e/219435167/VEsH/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://www.facebook.com/WilmotCollinsforSenate/posts/654421165031824")**
[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561647ae/1e3760f0/69fd687c/5f7e9a9e/219435167/VEsE/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://www.facebook.com/WilmotCollinsforSenate/posts/654421165031824")
[SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561647ae/1e3760f0/69fd687c/5f7e9a9f/219435167/VEsF/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://twitter.com/CollinsWilmot/status/1153829077167423494")
The people of Montana know that Senator Tester has their back and cares about our state. But when it comes to Steve Daines, most people have never met him and don't see him fighting for what matters to their families. That's why I need your support in my race to replace him in 2020.
Thank you for spreading the word,
Wilmot

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8504489/82410705/1282332719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA0ZTA2MS0xMGFlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kzFW5J3Yrv7SgdRmuiKfpLbNln0h1TERWeINCYu54zY=)
_CUP OF JOE ON THE ISSUES_
# "What is going on with Iran: national security and restoring U.S. global leadership"
## _9am, Saturday, July 27th, Clive, Iowa_
I've spoken at events at local Democratic Party groups, chambers of commerce, churches, veterans' groups and other venues across Iowa for the past few weeks. This week, I'll be kicking off the first of a series of our own events: "**Cup of Joe on the Issues**."
We'll be starting with a **conversation on Iran - at Wobbly Boots Roadhouse Iowa 1301 NW 114th St, Clive, Iowa 50325 in Clive, Iowa, at 9am CDT on Saturday, July 27th**. This follows on from a recent op-ed I authored in the Des Moines Register ([link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8504490/82410706/654585162?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA0ZTA2MS0xMGFlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kzFW5J3Yrv7SgdRmuiKfpLbNln0h1TERWeINCYu54zY=)) where I wrote on the folly of potential conflict with Iran, and the need to return to the nuclear deal and honor our word. It'll also be a chance to talk more generally about foreign policy and national security issues. As President Bill Clinton's former Director for Defense Policy and a former 3-star Admiral who commanded an aircraft carrier battle group in the Arabian Gulf, I hope you'll find my insights useful.
Please share the event with your friends and family. For those interested in learning more about me, my biography is [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8504491/82410707/-740882382?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA0ZTA2MS0xMGFlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kzFW5J3Yrv7SgdRmuiKfpLbNln0h1TERWeINCYu54zY=) and my latest brochure is [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8504492/82410708/1042400430?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA0ZTA2MS0xMGFlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kzFW5J3Yrv7SgdRmuiKfpLbNln0h1TERWeINCYu54zY=). You can also check out more details on the event on Facebook ([link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8504493/82410709/1199375171?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA0ZTA2MS0xMGFlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kzFW5J3Yrv7SgdRmuiKfpLbNln0h1TERWeINCYu54zY=)).
For any queries, please email my communications team on [press@joesestak.com](mailto:press@joesestak.com?subject=Des%20Moines%20Register%20Live%20Stream).

| Friend,
I hope I made you proud at last night's debate as I made my case as the conservative outsider who can bring a fresh perspective and an outside-the-box way of thinking to our state government.
WJTV's poll from last night's performance has us winning by a large margin. Thank you!
[If you were unable to tune-in, here is the link to rewatch the debate online.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015JMFa1OjRuq2btcGy-oQ-ZoFXQpumLqjTD0uPXe8FX8yuJFgrYh9Eed9iQJFeNyQ6tBM00A6LjhwQx1CLohKKZbeD01Wt-pizJp0rLKOZhcUsGY4wpUIHbBkLmkSAGrEg0OxshRABOuHnw3BPRE8DiBz6U_zNbt39sF43dHl0Nc5eUY7sGHpW9mIil7kfwQK3KVXwu9tgLlTXban_gLIi_MSK4ZdtyNfnAQ_1F7BYnk=&c=sEUKpU0nT11exqUq-_C54BA1aZXpvY5UtOzuyYd4hgpd5FdFblH6uQ==&ch=-0SP61QGG1zrmSQIUEL7JjtqYqGO8LXqLRzCGLSZr1sqF4AeEhN12A==) I hope you will.

Robert

name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: Less than one week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
John stood tall in the first debate--but with ten candidates on stage, he only had time to briefly preview his ideas for taking our bold, progressive successes in Colorado nationwide. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172f/691c9bd/6d31cd88/11a4618c/3750398529/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")

| Friend, John stood tall in the first debate--but with ten candidates on stage, he only had time to briefly preview his ideas for taking our bold, progressive successes in Colorado nationwide.

Less than one week from today, John will take the debate stage once again--and he intends to make the most of his time at the podium.

But in order for him to earn time in the fall debates, we need your help. For John to participate in any debates past next week, we need to show that 130,000 unique supporters have joined this team.

**We don 't yet have a record of support associated with this email address--if you haven't yet chipped in to help John build this team of 130,000, please do so today. $1 is all it takes.** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_TH_20190724-fr-TH-oneweekbump-nop_nop_b1&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&amount=1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Once fall hits, primary season will be in full swing--but without your help, John won't be a part of it.

We can't do this without you. _**[Will you chip in $1 today to help us grow this team?](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_TH_20190724-fr-TH-oneweekbump-nop_nop_l1&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Team Hickenlooper **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_JH_20190724-fr-TH-oneweekbump-nop_nop_contribbutton&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: A True American Hero, Scott Taylor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
As I'm preparing to grill Robert Mueller, I need to be reassured that Republicans will be going after and holding EVERY SINGLE DEMOCRAT accountable for lying to the American people about President Trump's collusion with Russia for the last two years. Allow me to explain: Mark Warner sits on the Senate Intelligence Committee, which is privy to information that the American public is not. From that respected seat of privileged information, Mark Warner deliberately lied to Virginians and the American people, obsessing on the false-illusion of Russian collusion. Virginia deserves better than a Senator who intentionally lies to his constituents in order to slander the name of record of successes of our President.
That is why I am specifically asking you today to give what you can to former Congressman Scott Taylor: he is a true American hero, and he is the only candidate who can knock out Mark Warner to deliver leadership and conservative values back to Virginia.
Scott Taylor has served as a U.S. Navy SEAL, Virginia Delegate, and the U.S. Congressman for Virginia's 2nd District. Scott also has a voting record that is consistently conservative and supportive of President Trump's impactful legislative agenda. While Warner's voting record was on average 97% in favor of Obama's liberal agenda.
I believe the [New York Times](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-PMZ5ugO09aIi5RWgzIAxjwsWSxs1FCzrepURzjz6p8hkac_Evj0ZELBJwJr9qeEXB2ViZFVWe8I3ozb_qQ-4OlKl-myYeieCSkNbnGx40gPaM4kMoKKWVv7a9RcXGJ6VO3BOoTX0Fw0bTXZiaozlYI7NPELfCDhWvAX3kFDsrYHDYO9Nemq1vf2V7pqH_ZlliU69EhPJOElcAK2hM3wyJXRrUTxdau_yJlT4Yvj7xkv2VVukHVPzZznFN_1yHOuKZhkeUj2xg92eCPiv_Plrw==&c=II-p9H4rKQRlefGYPMW5SybQkzdo0m_vzaj6M0jloPWwjFD_qdxMjQ==&ch=lTOfaQTOuVVPAcZCYERQNkm5Mo31vIKFVBHq0bzdJDys89RDGsh2kw==) put it best when they stated, "[Warner] has slogged through life in the Senate with few signature achievements, never quite finding his moment." NOW, we must hold Mark Warner accountable.
We have a leadership crisis in Virginia. Change is long overdue, and Scott Taylor is the man for the job.

[DONATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-PMZ5ugO09aIi5RWgzIAxjwsWSxs1FCzrepURzjz6p8hkac_Evj0ZELBJwJr9qeEHVDsyW9jPpxm5T3kr9oKhR0qKva2cDddVp8THk7kaBYhr1LeVaFOybBAyueWwV1BL9Cl1mxpNGMlw2ScpenjxiUoKW4kNt4rLWtrVDbMW2BSj7H1mhcSSgfWC19SreG2Y9VpkAr2P23aBamP5sP6cPUx3TyHVBe4YEvRJ8IFnQLA7TEacJt8s08yfHaNyWgMiCM_MsAurPer0vQgSX8aEw==&c=II-p9H4rKQRlefGYPMW5SybQkzdo0m_vzaj6M0jloPWwjFD_qdxMjQ==&ch=lTOfaQTOuVVPAcZCYERQNkm5Mo31vIKFVBHq0bzdJDys89RDGsh2kw==) now if you support conservative values in Virginia. [DONATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-PMZ5ugO09aIi5RWgzIAxjwsWSxs1FCzrepURzjz6p8hkac_Evj0ZELBJwJr9qeESTkMSlHhljNHTWuG5tB12OP9Fg4ZlDo-4dC-191lCytFs9TLoV9k3DUKpCQ_QfFUtMqoeU3YjyxO-ymZm9mEgKGiTVfK824rvNI1xode2AnzsfA973vErzpdIoJr-WUT8Duzv0KNvHwJcSbrYIWMaOEkZnCAOLbThsCxRwT_SdV7BQ4pF53hm98dEKGMJOEpCajz5FqMjcJUQV7Brecvag==&c=II-p9H4rKQRlefGYPMW5SybQkzdo0m_vzaj6M0jloPWwjFD_qdxMjQ==&ch=lTOfaQTOuVVPAcZCYERQNkm5Mo31vIKFVBHq0bzdJDys89RDGsh2kw==) now if you oppose the Democrat's leftist, out of touch policies. [DONATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-PMZ5ugO09aIi5RWgzIAxjwsWSxs1FCzrepURzjz6p8hkac_Evj0ZELBJwJr9qeEu5GyCDU_91mfNDtdaQVx6-au4W_4_AzfUKK6LmcTUgpGB-lVrJZHs9PYvs3x3MkyrCnNgQo4-AC3zp73K22LZryM8KoPr95nAeyNnbs82w5gKco3kz7dV4FB9wammolgEAj_PvivxUCf2L4WNAo_ssJtvKwk2zj43ipwozykSzKu73pUJ2ZVrBxyeSPAO1MiThc7fLOxQJGLxRMq0uyCbg==&c=II-p9H4rKQRlefGYPMW5SybQkzdo0m_vzaj6M0jloPWwjFD_qdxMjQ==&ch=lTOfaQTOuVVPAcZCYERQNkm5Mo31vIKFVBHq0bzdJDys89RDGsh2kw==) now to help us turn Virginia Red - by helping Scott Taylor win election.

[JOIN](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-PMZ5ugO09aIi5RWgzIAxjwsWSxs1FCzrepURzjz6p8hkac_Evj0ZELBJwJr9qeE4mfoiin9-IwEHmtZAf7HtzWEtEpeMdBfh43cij8XDckNttEwP775EXbt6EzIEUYOgKbrncvYwMn8FU0AriCFAz6wRXa76GwF5b4IEIeV1m--v0BWkl2ZBvYXtQXq0g488QaWI_ob5X9xCFGsmC746egnFSMUHyp7EJECwuy1kQvwh8FN4JeUPxU8TtablT9R7TZqhsqQNA8AKOVfmZ1i4g==&c=II-p9H4rKQRlefGYPMW5SybQkzdo0m_vzaj6M0jloPWwjFD_qdxMjQ==&ch=lTOfaQTOuVVPAcZCYERQNkm5Mo31vIKFVBHq0bzdJDys89RDGsh2kw==) Scott Taylor's growing team of volunteers.

When you hear about our monthly fundraising goals and FEC deadlines, you might wonder if those are made-up tactics.

They aren't. They really do matter and we want to take a moment to explain why:

Elizabeth is running a unique campaign -- one that has sworn off closed-door fundraisers with special access to her for top donors.

Because we don't rely on big money, hitting our grassroots fundraising goal before each deadline is crucial to growing this movement. We've laid out a month-by-month plan for how we're going to win -- and right now, we need to hit our July goal to make it happen.

[**Will you make your first contribution right now -- even $3 would make a huge difference -- to help reach our July fundraising goal and secure the resources we need to build the biggest possible grassroots movement?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e9f7/45c30650/14151e2f8/669e09ca/3759471889/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDcyNGVtMS1mdWxsIn0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190724em1-full")

body:

| | Special Counsel Robert Mueller is testifying before Congress today, and he will likely discuss his findings on Russian interference in the 2016 election.

We know that Russia interfered in our election, and they must be held accountable. That’s why I support bipartisan legislation that would secure our elections from foreign influence.

If passed, this legislation would increase confidence in the electoral process, inform local communities about how to secure elections, and enhance coordination between all levels of government.

[**We must prevent future election interference. Add your name to our petition now if you agree.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8515791/82505521/527934681?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGVmYTMwYy0zZmFlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRn631uI9d3yVCL-Y3PV6mHTGYCXFcoo_k5Q4TGybBM=)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8515792/82505522/527934681?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGVmYTMwYy0zZmFlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRn631uI9d3yVCL-Y3PV6mHTGYCXFcoo_k5Q4TGybBM=)
It is integral to our democracy that we have safe and fair elections. This legislation would get to the heart of the problem, and help protect the integrity of the ballot box.

[**It’s time to take steps to protect our elections. Add your name if you want to join me in preventing foreign governments from meddling in our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8515793/82505523/527934681?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGVmYTMwYy0zZmFlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRn631uI9d3yVCL-Y3PV6mHTGYCXFcoo_k5Q4TGybBM=)

Thank you,

Dan

_Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. name: Team Sri
subject: Straight from the horse’s mouth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Folks, we finally get to hear the truth straight from the horse’s mouth during Special Counsel Robert Mueller testimony today.

But here’s what Pete Olson said about the Mueller Report:

"I’m glad the Mueller investigation is finally complete. After wasting 25 million dollars of taxpayer money, the American people finally know the truth - there was NO collusion between President Trump & Russia & NO obstruction." (Source below)

Sri believes that the Mueller investigation proves, beyond any reasonable doubt, that there was a massive Russian attack on our elections and on our democracy. Also, this investigation established that there are very few Republicans in Congress willing to stand up for rule of law when it is under direct attack.

Sri is running to stand up for our democracy, for the checks and balances granted to Congress in the Constitution. He’s running because he believes it's time to put partisanship aside for the higher purpose of preserving our democratic institutions. Will you join our movement and help send Sri to Congress to restore dignity and transparency to our democratic process?

DONATE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sri2020_email_072019?refcode=0724email

Thank you so much for standing with Sri!

-Team Sri
Sri for Congress 2020 – Texas’ 22nd Congressional District

(Source: https://thetexan.news/breaking-texas-representative-al-green-expected-to-file-articles-of-impeachment-against-trump-tonight/)

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: What Trump's really done for West Virginia..
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
**DEMO MEMO:** Trump is coming to Wheeling today for a private fundraiser for his campaign. Earlier in the week, Trump claimed West Virginia is doing "really well" since he was elected President. This is what Trump has really done for West Virginia:
* 16 WV counties are economically distressed [[link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8515900/82506162/529258941?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjZlNDkyMS00MWFlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbTkxTZQMOzP_0-mixBHgqByx-NZyP3YQs_jmgYMaSo=)]
* WV saw its POVERTY RATE INCREASE during Trump's first year in office to 19.1% [[link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8515901/82506163/-1087619192?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjZlNDkyMS00MWFlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbTkxTZQMOzP_0-mixBHgqByx-NZyP3YQs_jmgYMaSo=)]
* 24% of WV kids are living in poverty
* For 3 years in a row, Trump proposed cutting funding for SNAP, which provides nutrition assistance benefits to roughly 340,000 West Virginians yearly [[link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8515902/82506164/600612661?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjZlNDkyMS00MWFlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbTkxTZQMOzP_0-mixBHgqByx-NZyP3YQs_jmgYMaSo=&utm_term=.98f8f029a08e)]
* Trump has relentlessly sought to take health care away from West Virginians, including nearly 800,000 West Virginians with pre-existing conditions
* Overturning our healthcare law would also gut protections that lower out of pocket and prescription drug costs
* Repealing or overturning our healthcare law would gut our Medicaid expansion which has been critical to fighting the opioid epidemic [[link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8515903/82506165/109911259?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjZlNDkyMS00MWFlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbTkxTZQMOzP_0-mixBHgqByx-NZyP3YQs_jmgYMaSo=)]
* Attorney General Patrick Morrisey is one of the plaintiffs seeking to overturn our healthcare law with no replacement [[link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8515904/82506166/257775527?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjZlNDkyMS00MWFlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbTkxTZQMOzP_0-mixBHgqByx-NZyP3YQs_jmgYMaSo=)]
* West Virginia's working families are set to see their taxes rise on average within the next decade [[link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8515905/82506167/1575838173?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjZlNDkyMS00MWFlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbTkxTZQMOzP_0-mixBHgqByx-NZyP3YQs_jmgYMaSo=)]

body:
50,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Mueller is testifying NOW. Sign my emergency petition to protect his testimony from Trump's last-second sabotage.>>
---
| | **BREAKING: TRUMP USING LAST-SECOND PRESSURE TO TRY TO SILENCE MUELLER** **[50,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Mueller is testifying NOW. Sign my emergency petition to protect his testimony from Trump 's last-second sabotage. >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50d/18e32a7f/57bb3d76/7bb0f98c/3690047818/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mueller-survey?source=20190724_em_pet_b1_mtvbrl_all")** | I'm fuming. As I type this, Robert Mueller is finally testifying before Congress.

But at the last second, Trump is trying to use the power of the White House to silence and intimidate the Special Counsel from telling Americans the TRUTH. **I need your help NOW to fix this.** [_**Quickly -- I need 50,000 signatures on my emergency petition to PROTECT Mueller 's critical testimony today. We cannot let Trump sabotage what could be the ONLY opportunity we have to hear from Mueller. >> **_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50d/18e32a7f/57bb3d76/7bb0f98c/3690047818/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mueller-survey?source=20190724_em_pet_b1_mtvbrl_all") **NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com ** ** ** | **[SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50d/18e32a7f/57bb3d76/7bb0f98c/3690047818/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mueller-survey?source=20190724_em_pet_b1_mtvbrl_all")**
---

This is the most important ask I have ever made of you.

As I type this, Robert Mueller is testifying before Congress.

But at the last second, Trump is trying to use the power of the White House to silence and intimidate the Special Counsel from telling Americans the TRUTH.

I can't overstate how urgently we need to act.

This could be the ONLY time we hear from Robert Mueller -- our ONLY chance to find the full truth.

I won't let Trump sabotage Mueller's testimony at the last second if it's the last thing I do.

[_**I need 50,000 signatures on my emergency petition to protect Mueller 's testimony from Trump's sabotage. The safety of every future election we hold rests on Mueller's full and complete testimony today. Will you sign ASAP? >> **_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50d/18e32a7f/57bb3d76/7bb0f98c/3690047818/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mueller-survey?source=20190724_em_pet_b1_mtvbrl_all")

I'm counting on your signature more than you know.

Thank you,

Ben Ray Lujan

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50d/18e32a7f/57bb3d76/7bb0f98d/3690047818/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50d/18e32a7f/57bb3d76/7bb0f982/3690047818/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50d/18e32a7f/57bb3d76/7bb0f983/3690047818/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50d/18e32a7f/57bb3d76/7bb0f980/3690047818/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50d/18e32a7f/57bb3d76/7bb0f981/3690047818/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50d/18e32a7f/57bb3d76/7bb0f986/3690047818/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Mentions of Immigration as Top Problem Surpass Record High
body:
"After hitting a new high last month, mentions of immigration as the most important problem facing the U.S. increased further to 27% in July." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fccf7e1ea5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Mentions of Immigration as Top Problem Surpass Record High**

“After hitting a new high last month, mentions of immigration as the most important problem facing the U.S. increased further to 27% in July,” Jeffrey Jones writes for Gallup. As Jones explains, that number is historically significant.

“Gallup has asked the ‘most important problem’ question since 1939, and has done so on a monthly basis since March 2001. Over the past 19 years, only five other issues have been mentioned at some point by at least the 27% who named immigration this month.”

“Immigration is likely to remain a top issue for Americans, particularly at points when large numbers of immigrants or asylum seekers are attempting to enter the country illegally.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c4b62e5b64&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “There’s nothing like a celebrity guest to boost a flagging TV show, and House Democrats are hoping Robert Mueller’s congressional performance this week revives their impeachment ratings. Yet if the former special counsel stays true to his own investigation and report, this episode will be the last,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a8c35498da&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| For Democrats, questioning former Special Counsel Robert Mueller “is the last bite at the apple in the failed attempt to prove Donald Trump colluded with Russia during the 2016 campaign or otherwise obstructed justice during the subsequent investigation. The summary of the report has already been released by the attorney general and then the report itself by Mueller and the unredacted version has been available for lawmakers to see for months,” the [_Boston Herald_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=090bf4aa54&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “Now, during this rerun of a rerun of a rerun, Democrats are hoping a disinterested public will finally become outraged and begin the chant for impeachment. They won’t.”
---
|
---
| “White House adviser Ivanka Trump on Monday visited Lockheed Martin in Littleton, Colorado for a roundtable discussion on the company’s workforce development and apprenticeship programs as part of her workforce development tour,” Julia Limitone reports for [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0d4ea2487&e=3ee4985eea). “During the meeting, Trump applauded the company and its CEO Marillyn Hewson for keeping its Sikorsky helicopter plant in Pennsylvania open at President Trump’s request, saving more than 400 jobs and committing to expand the American workforce.”
---
|
---
| “From day one, the Trump administration has fulfilled its promise to create good jobs for American workers”—in Virginia alone, unemployment has dropped “from 4% to 3% as more than 127,000 more Virginians found jobs,” Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross writes in [_The Virginian-Pilot_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99c01f0fbe&e=3ee4985eea). “Already, more than 280 companies and organizations have pledged nearly 10 million enhanced training and career opportunities for American students and workers” as part of President Trump’s Pledge to America’s Workers.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ebb809c61&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a9939f1a11&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=2b3d2e7792)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Yet if the former special counsel stays true to his own investigation and report, this episode will be the last,” editorial board writes. | | For Democrats, questioning former Special Counsel Robert Mueller “is the last bite at the apple in the failed attempt to prove Donald Trump colluded with Russia during the 2016 campaign or otherwise obstructed justice during the subsequent investigation. The summary of the report has already been released by the attorney general and then the report itself by Mueller and the unredacted version has been available for lawmakers to see for months,” the editorial board writes. “Now, during this rerun of a rerun of a rerun, Democrats are hoping a disinterested public will finally become outraged and begin the chant for impeachment. They won’t.” | | “White House adviser Ivanka Trump on Monday visited Lockheed Martin in Littleton, Colorado for a roundtable discussion on the company’s workforce development and apprenticeship programs as part of her workforce development tour,” Julia Limitone reports for . “During the meeting, Trump applauded the company and its CEO Marillyn Hewson for keeping its Sikorsky helicopter plant in Pennsylvania open at President Trump’s request, saving more than 400 jobs and committing to expand the American workforce.” | | “From day one, the Trump administration has fulfilled its promise to create good jobs for American workers”—in Virginia alone, unemployment has dropped “from 4% to 3% as more than 127,000 more Virginians found jobs,” Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross writes in . “Already, more than 280 companies and organizations have pledged nearly 10 million enhanced training and career opportunities for American students and workers” as part of President Trump’s Pledge to America’s Workers. | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

| Hey team, I want to make sure you heard about tonight's debate prep call. Cory needs your help prepping for the next debate -- and you're invited to join the call tonight at 5:45 PM ET. Cory will brief our team about how he's been preparing and answer any questions you may have. Our prep sessions with Cory this week have been going really well and we're confident that when he steps on that stage next week, he'll show the nation why he's the candidate who can -- and will -- defeat Donald Trump and unite our country. But that's enough from me. I know you'd rather hear directly from Cory about what we're going over in debate prep. And team, don't forget, you can submit your question for him to answer live on the call. [_**As a dedicated supporter of this campaign, we 'd love for you to join us. subject: become a community endorser today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Our campaign is on the lookout for Americans just like you to join our team!

Can you commit to coming aboard this growing movement and helping us spread Tim's vision for America, including but not limited to increasing access to affordable health care, making sure our veterans are taken care of, giving middle-class families the resources they need to thrive, reforming education and making college more affordable?

[**If you are interested in joining us to push forward this positive message, click here to become a community endorser.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c7e/5486deaa/232a47d2/dc8a372/3788559773/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/become-a-community-endorser-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+If+you+are+interested+in+joining+us+to+p&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190724_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190724_1_1_T2")

We could always use more hands on deck to get the word out -- the more the merrier!

This is a campaign that is wholly rooted in grassroots strength and energy -- that's why becoming a community endorser would be so meaningful. We truly rely on our community endorsers to represent our movement in their communities and neighborhoods -- they are our on-the-ground support system. [**Will you join them?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c7e/5486deaa/232a47d2/dc8a375/3788559773/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/become-a-community-endorser-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+join+them&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190724_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190724_1_1_T2")

Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! name: Kamala Harris
subject: Will you give me a moment to explain?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
I am doing everything I can to prepare for next week’s presidential primary debates in Detroit. Give me a quick second to tell you how this is impacting our campaign and how you can help: After last month’s debate, our campaign surged -- in the polls, with endorsements, volunteers, fundraising, and more. For hours after the debate, our campaign was the number one Google search in the country. **It was clear our message had broken through and millions of Americans were ready to join our campaign to defeat Donald Trump.** With another debate next week, I am spending time getting ready to make sure I’m prepared. The stakes are simply too high -- but that means a lot less time for fundraising. And according to our team, we’re behind on our fundraising goals for July -- and the last thing I want to do is stop preparing for the upcoming debate to focus on raising money for our campaign. We’ve set a target of raising $500,000 online before I head to the debate stage just a week from today, so I’m asking: **Will you make a contribution to our campaign before next week’s presidential primary debate? Every donation you make helps us towards our important goal and allows me to focus on preparing and campaigning:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190724-eom?refcode=ema190724-eom1-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1&refcode2=5707_5755789_sT7kzW&akid=5707%2E5755789%2EsT7kzW)

| [Chip in $100 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190724-eom?refcode=ema190724-eom1-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=4&refcode2=5707_5755789_sT7kzW&akid=5707%2E5755789%2EsT7kzW)

We need a nominee who is tough enough to take on Trump. He is defiling the office of the Presidency every single day and I am ready to take him on -- but we need to win this primary first.
Anything you can pitch in will go a long way toward helping us do that ahead of next week’s debate.
Thanks for all you do.
For The People,
— Kamala Harris

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: It’s time for House Democrats to begin impeachment hearings against the president
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

This is a dangerous time for our democracy. Robert Mueller’s testimony today confirms what the House should already know: It’s time to begin impeachment proceedings against the president.

The president’s claims of a “witch hunt” are his way of hiding the facts and House Democrats have a duty to lead regardless of whether or not it’s politically advantageous. They have their job as elected officials and we have ours – to win a Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate.

We need a Democratic majority in the Senate, which means we have to start here – in Georgia. Can you donate $5 right now so we can build this campaign and make history? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mueller_hearing?refcode=em072419b&noskip=true]

The president has not been exonerated from obstruction of justice and he’s publicly stated that he would use foreign interference in his campaign to attack an opponent, again. Even three years later, he still disputes the election results.

Trump’s racism, sexism, and xenophobia are all stains on the office of the president and despite House Democrats vowing to hold him accountable in the 2018 midterms once they had the majority, impeachment proceedings have yet to happen. We can’t delay justice, and we can’t delay action to win this race.

I’m not afraid to tell Georgia and the country that impeachment hearings must begin now, but without a Senate majority, Democrats can’t hold the president accountable. As your next U.S. Senator I will fight for justice in Washington, make a contribution of $5 to my campaign and join the fight with me. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mueller_hearing?refcode=em072419b&noskip=true]

Thank you for stepping up during this critical time for our democracy.

Yours truly,

Teresa

DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mueller_hearing?refcode=em072419b&noskip=true]

<<View this email in your browser.>> [https://teresatomlinson.com/mueller-trump-was-not-exonerated/]

name: Alert (via Team Shedd)
subject: Dem initiative to make Tucson a sanctuary city
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, _**Tucson, AZ is at RISK of becoming a sanctuary city.**_
The radical Democrats have already collected **over 18,000 signatures** to put this initiative on the November ballot. subject: Two important truths
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:

| _**[We need a Democratic president in 2020. We need to take back the Senate majority. Our work to deliver both cannot wait any longer. Pitch in now and help us deliver a Democratic victory.](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-2020-victory?refcode=EM-072419_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ Hello,

Today, former Special Counsel Robert Muller is reiterating two important truths before Congress:

> 1) Russian meddling in our elections deserves the attention of every American.
>
> 2) Mueller's investigation did NOT exonerate President Trump of obstruction of justice.
But what you are hearing from Republicans in Congress is that the "case is closed."

Republicans in Congress have no interest in preventing future Russian meddling in our elections.

And they have no interest in holding President Trump accountable for his actions.

**If we 're going to restore the soul of our Democracy, we must lay the groundwork now for a Democratic victory in 2020.**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Happening right now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
As I send this, Robert Mueller is finishing his testimony on Capitol Hill about his findings regarding Russian interference into the 2016 elections--and Donald Trump's potential involvement in that in | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172d/691c9bd/6d35d239/11a466f4/2117209873/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend: As I send this, Robert Mueller is finishing his testimony on Capitol Hill about his findings regarding Russian interference into the 2016 elections--and Donald Trump's potential involvement in that interference.

But here's the bigger picture: _We have still not resolved many of the vulnerabilities that left us open to interference in 2016._ And Donald Trump has not taken steps to meet or even _acknowledge_ this challenge.

**It 's absolutely critical that in 2020, we elect leaders who will take these threats to our democracy seriously--and as our next President, I plan to meet them head on. Chip in to help me build the campaign that can win in 2020:**
****[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_JH_20190724-fr-JH-mueller-all_all_b1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_JH_20190724-fr-JH-mueller-all_all_b5&recurring=auto&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_JH_20190724-fr-JH-mueller-all_all_b25&recurring=auto&amount=25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_JH_20190724-fr-JH-mueller-all_all_b50&recurring=auto&amount=50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_JH_20190724-fr-JH-mueller-all_all_b100&recurring=auto&amount=100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_JH_20190724-fr-JH-mueller-all_all_bother&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** Mueller's testimony is important, but it is not sufficient.

I'm here to say: we need to think bigger than that. Securing our elections and rehabilitating our democracy won't happen in one five-hour hearing. It has to be a long-term, sustained, unending effort--which, yes, starts with making Donald a one-term president in November 2020.

[**_Chip in to help make it happen._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_JH_20190724-fr-JH-mueller-all_all_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,
John ****** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_JH_20190724-fr-JH-mueller-all_all_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")********
---

---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172d/691c9bd/6d35d239/11a466ea/2117209873/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172d/691c9bd/6d35d239/11a466eb/2117209873/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172d/691c9bd/6d35d239/11a466e8/2117209873/VEsHBg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172d/691c9bd/6d35d239/11a466e9/2117209873/VEsHAQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172d/691c9bd/6d35d239/11a466e6/2117209873/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: Wilmot for Montana
subject: Steve Daines and Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
Whether it's voting to strip health care from millions of Americans, installing extreme judges, or blocking action to help protect farmers and families from climate change, time and again, Steve Daines has stood in lockstep with Mitch McConnell and the GOP agenda.
Montanans don't need a puppet for Mitch McConnell in the Senate. They need someone who will fight for them every day and solve the important issues to their families and communities.
[**It 's time to give Steve Daines a pink slip and elect someone who will have Montanans' backs. Contribute $5 right now to help us send Wilmot Collins to the U.S. Senate.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190724&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Millionaires and the special interests love Mitch McConnell's partisan agenda--that's why they are already lining up to support Steve Daines and keep Montana's Senate seat in their grasp.
But together, the people of Montana can speak in a voice that is more powerful than any special interest or wealthy elite. We have the power to reclaim this seat and turn Montana blue again.
That's the thing the billionaires like the Koch Brothers don't understand, they've got the money, but we've got the people.
[**We need another Senator for Montanans, not another Senator for Mitch McConnell. Join our team and help elect Wilmot Collins to the Senate with a $5 contribution now.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190724&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Team Wilmot
**[contribute](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190724&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

name: Morley
subject: host a debate watch party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Tim is ecstatic to be heading to Detroit at the end of the month for the second round of presidential debates.

This is a critical moment in the race for President -- and for our movement. With the Democratic field growing, we need our supporters now more than ever backing us up and showing enthusiasm for Tim's vision and platform.

**[That's why we are asking you to host a debate party on July 30th.](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c7c/5486deaa/2330f4c2/dc8a322/1029163783/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/sign-up-to-host-a-second-debate-watch-party?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+are+asking+you+to+host&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190724_2_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190724_2_2_T2") **This is a great opportunity to get involved in your community and talk politics with friends, family, and loved ones.

Tim knows he has what it takes to get his message across in Detroit at the end of this month, and beat Donald Trump in the race for the Presidency at the end of next year -- but he needs his supporters by his side.

[**Click here to learn more about hosting a debate watch party!**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c7c/5486deaa/2330f4c2/dc8a325/1029163783/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/sign-up-to-host-a-second-debate-watch-party?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+learn+more+about+hosting+a&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190724_2_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190724_2_2_T2")

Thanks team,
Morley

|

name: Kandi, Team Hood
subject: priority number one (serving Mississippi’s families)
body:
|
---
Our pre-primary filing deadline is coming up soon, and when fundraising reports are published, everyone from the media to our opponents will be watching to see how strong this campaign really is.
Friend,

Our pre-primary filing deadline is coming up soon. And when fundraising reports are published, everyone from the media to our opponents will be watching to see how strong this campaign really is. **We close the books this Saturday, and[we need your help to prove that Jim has the grassroots support needed to win this race!](https://act.myngp.com/el/oe8_aoHXqrtB82wgxFUOcPpWtJZJDKJ4IwU7AkWaXHw=/XcMOcC2OBkUjKeX0V6aKc93PPZSh8Vr0mdTaSmyB-Lk=?refcode=20190724nd&amount=10)**

Honestly, Tate Reeves is going to publish an enormous number. He has special interests pouring cash into his campaign, and **he has a war chest totaling almost _$6 million_** as of the last reporting deadline.

The good news is we don't have to outraise Tate Reeves -- we just need enough to run a winning grassroots campaign that can beat him at the ballot box. That's why **we 've set a goal of bringing on 300 new donors** before Saturday's pre-primary deadline.

**If Jim 's going to win in November, we have to reach this goal. Will you rush a donation before we close the books on Saturday?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/oe8_aoHXqrtB82wgxFUOcPpWtJZJDKJ4IwU7AkWaXHw=/XcMOcC2OBkUjKeX0V6aKc93PPZSh8Vr0mdTaSmyB-Lk=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190724nd&amount=5)**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/oe8_aoHXqrtB82wgxFUOcPpWtJZJDKJ4IwU7AkWaXHw=/XcMOcC2OBkUjKeX0V6aKc93PPZSh8Vr0mdTaSmyB-Lk=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190724nd&amount=10)**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/oe8_aoHXqrtB82wgxFUOcPpWtJZJDKJ4IwU7AkWaXHw=/XcMOcC2OBkUjKeX0V6aKc93PPZSh8Vr0mdTaSmyB-Lk=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190724nd&amount=25)**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/oe8_aoHXqrtB82wgxFUOcPpWtJZJDKJ4IwU7AkWaXHw=/XcMOcC2OBkUjKeX0V6aKc93PPZSh8Vr0mdTaSmyB-Lk=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190724nd&amount=50)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/oe8_aoHXqrtB82wgxFUOcPpWtJZJDKJ4IwU7AkWaXHw=/XcMOcC2OBkUjKeX0V6aKc93PPZSh8Vr0mdTaSmyB-Lk=?refcode=20190724nd)**
Jim relies on grassroots support to fund his campaign because **he 's accountable to the people of Mississippi**. On the other hand, Tate Reeves is accountable to the wealthy special interests and out-of-state corporations pouring money into his campaign coffers.

For Jim, **serving Mississippi 's families has always been priority number one** \-- first as a prosecutor and now as our Attorney General. He'll continue putting our families first as governor, but he needs your help to win this race first!

[**Will you donate today to help us reach our 300 new supporter goal and show everyone that Jim has the grassroots strength to win in November?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oe8_aoHXqrtB82wgxFUOcPpWtJZJDKJ4IwU7AkWaXHw=/XcMOcC2OBkUjKeX0V6aKc93PPZSh8Vr0mdTaSmyB-Lk=?refcode=20190724nd&amount=10)

Thank you,

Kandi Walker
Deputy Finance Director

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oe8_aoHXqrtB82wgxFUOcPpWtJZJDKJ4IwU7AkWaXHw=/XcMOcC2OBkUjKeX0V6aKc93PPZSh8Vr0mdTaSmyB-Lk=?refcode=20190724nd&amount=10)

name: Team Spanberger
subject: Foreign Interference in our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/d0P3mI2zq6i0RnEeOgTJYNBTqh4_FCSr_FBKVmMHWKw=/2V37OP9CcDWbNDU8AV47xjG4_dGzFcSnok9RN9RKeRg=?refcode=BLU-footer)
---
Peter,

We know that in 2016 Russian agents acting on behalf of the Kremlin worked to influence our elections. They used a variety of channels, most notably, they fed Americans divisive ads via social media meant to exacerbate existing tensions in our country.

This was by design. It was not only meant to create agitation, **[but it was also meant to undermine faith in our country and faith in our democratic process](https://act.myngp.com/el/d0P3mI2zq6i0RnEeOgTJYNBTqh4_FCSr_FBKVmMHWKw=/xoYvM6tgTc-XJLQpGSCfl2HGYfzgViHvqb_jFrOmC_U=).**

Today, Special Counsel Robert Mueller testified before Congress about his report. His report illuminates the attacks of 2016 and serves as a warning call for all of us as we plan for 2020.

[_**> >>Can you take a moment now to sign our petition if you agree that state and federal authorities should prioritize election security?>>>>**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/d0P3mI2zq6i0RnEeOgTJYNBTqh4_FCSr_FBKVmMHWKw=/xoYvM6tgTc-XJLQpGSCfl2HGYfzgViHvqb_jFrOmC_U=) | | | [ PRIORITIZE ELECTION SECURITY](https://act.myngp.com/el/d0P3mI2zq6i0RnEeOgTJYNBTqh4_FCSr_FBKVmMHWKw=/xoYvM6tgTc-XJLQpGSCfl2HGYfzgViHvqb_jFrOmC_U=)
---
Abigail is working diligently on this issue. She is co-chair of Task Force Sentry, a bipartisan group of legislators committed to taking action to prevent further attacks. With leadership like hers in the House, we're closer to ensuring elections without meddling.
| | [ PRIORITIZE ELECTION SECURITY](https://act.myngp.com/el/d0P3mI2zq6i0RnEeOgTJYNBTqh4_FCSr_FBKVmMHWKw=/xoYvM6tgTc-XJLQpGSCfl2HGYfzgViHvqb_jFrOmC_U=)
---
Only with continued diligence will we be able to ensure the integrity of our system.

Thank you,

Team Spanberger

* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/d0P3mI2zq6i0RnEeOgTJYNBTqh4_FCSr_FBKVmMHWKw=/2V37OP9CcDWbNDU8AV47xjG4_dGzFcSnok9RN9RKeRg=?refcode=BLU-footer&recurring=true) Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/d0P3mI2zq6i0RnEeOgTJYNBTqh4_FCSr_FBKVmMHWKw=/79UGxzoaYvdmG5v1cDyePlbj6jQTWi8dbBuoDD1e6ws=). **If you wish to receive fewer emails,[click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/d0P3mI2zq6i0RnEeOgTJYNBTqh4_FCSr_FBKVmMHWKw=/CDs8pNw-4-EYyNCBB-HR2KDcjqwKCtoZ-RqW7e0UgIM=).** If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/d0P3mI2zq6i0RnEeOgTJYNBTqh4_FCSr_FBKVmMHWKw=/optXxXs2QZTUXGJ5b9FMDmMJGgrvIdJSDqcR7EG9aEY=). name: Jodi M, Beto Supporter
subject: What happened to me and my family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
#
Hi.
My name is Jodi. I’m a long-time Beto supporter from Temple, Texas. I wanted to take a minute to share why I believe so deeply in this campaign for president.
I’m a single mom of two: a girl and a boy, aged 17 and 10. My son was born nearly 11 weeks premature. He required a long stay at the NICU, and has suffered from medical problems, including epilepsy, for most of his life. And when he was 5 months old, my daughter was diagnosed with a rare cancer.
Even with health insurance and COBRA, I had to use my life savings to pay for their care. They’ve both grown up to be healthy, thankfully, but I’m terrified knowing that because of their pre-existing conditions, the rug could get pulled out from under us and their health care could be taken away.
**Beto’s plan would fix that.** He’s fighting for universal, guaranteed, high-quality health care. He’s fighting for a world where people like me — and the millions of Americans who have experienced the same, or even worse — won’t have to worry about how we’ll afford to keep our children safe and healthy. Most importantly, he’s doing it all by talking and listening to regular people. Not the health insurance lobby. Not pharmaceutical CEOs. Just _us._
**That’s why I believe in Beto O’Rourke. It’s why I supported him in his Senate race, and it’s why I’m supporting him for president today.**
[Will you join me today in making a $3 contribution to Beto so we can fight for universal health care for all?.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18416?refcode=ema20190724-44624&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=44624%2E444211%2EFSYIea)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18416?refcode=ema20190724-44624&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=44624%2E444211%2EFSYIea)**
The truth is, what happened to my family isn’t unique. In fact, I consider myself _fortunate_ that we made it through without racking up mountains of medical debt. But that’s not the case for everyone.
Millions of people are in a position where a single diagnosis could send them into severe debt; that they might have to choose between putting food on the table for their families or seeking treatment for an illness. My family went through that. And to me, electing Beto and fighting for his vision is the best way to make sure no other family goes through the same thing.
Thank you,

Jodi M.
Temple, Texas
**[Contribute »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18416?refcode=ema20190724-44624&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=44624%2E444211%2EFSYIea)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=44624%2E444211%2EFSYIea). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: Why workers need a Bill of Rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
We can't just complain about the 1% and Wall Street. We must also take action. Together.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf211f5/1630b3eb/512f19a1/5f555c65/1706618416/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/21st-century-workers-bill-of-rights?source=687_org_em_lb")
Friend --
Today marks the 10 year anniversary since the last minimum wage increase. Politics aside, the facts are the facts: working people are falling behind -- and we're running out of time to close the gap.
Many Americans are working two and three jobs to provide for their families, but they don't get the basic protections they need to keep going.
We can't just complain about the 1% and Wall Street. We must also take action. That's why I proposed a 21st Century Workers' Bill of Rights yesterday. And that's why we're looking to people like you to take action on making it a reality.
**[Read my op-ed describing the 21st Century Workers' Bill of Rights now and let me know what you think about it. I'd love to hear your thoughts.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf211f5/1630b3eb/512f19a1/5f555c65/1706618416/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/21st-century-workers-bill-of-rights?source=687_org_em_lb")**
Key policies in the 21st Century Workers' Bill of Rights include protections from unfair job terminations, paid sick and family leave, flexible scheduling, protection from employer interference, strengthening the Department of Labor's ability to investigate abusive employers, and restoring worker and union power.
I've said it before, and I'll say it again, and again, and again:
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf211f5/1630b3eb/512f19a1/5f555c65/1706618416/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/21st-century-workers-bill-of-rights?source=687_org_em_lb")
Make no mistake: progressive platforms that center on worker and union power have thrived here in New York City. We've led the way in the fight for a $15 minimum wage and enacted paid sick leave so that New Yorkers don't have to worry about losing their livelihoods if they go to the hospital. We've already had fair scheduling on the books for two years.
This is what we can do for the whole nation.
**[Get the details on the 21st Century Workers' Bill of Rights here, and leave a comment to let me know what you think.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf211f5/1630b3eb/512f19a1/5f555c65/1706618416/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/21st-century-workers-bill-of-rights?source=687_org_em_lb")**
We can't wait another ten years for a proposal that doesn't even begin to address the bigger problems working people face. Together, let's make sure working people have a seat at the table again.
Together we can,
Bill

[LEARN MORE»](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf211f5/1630b3eb/512f19a1/5f555c65/1706618416/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/21st-century-workers-bill-of-rights?source=687_org_em_lb")
---

PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you'd like to unsubscribe, you can click [_here_](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf211f5/1630b3eb/512f19a1/5f555c64/1706618416/VEsA/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/unsubscribe"), but we'd hate to see you go. Learn more about [Bill's campaign](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf211f5/1630b3eb/512f19a1/5f555c6b/1706618416/VEsB/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://billdeblasio.com/") here.

name: Larry Cohen, Our Revolution
subject: It means challenging big money in politics by taking on corporate-backed candidates in both parties -- up and down the ballot.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
We must challenge big money in politics by taking on corporate-backed candidates in both parties -- up and down the ballot
#
Authoritarianism is here in America. It's taken form in an endlessly corrupt president who is willing to use hate speech to distract from his crimes and from the policies designed to enrich the elite and weaken our democracy.

That's why our mission at Our Revolution is so essential.

[**_Donate $27 or whatever you can afford to help us ensure America lives up to our nation 's unfulfilled, founding promise and reflects the will of the people._**](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-july-fr?amount=27&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+Donate+27+or+whatever+you+can+afford+to+&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1")

Our Revolution has three intertwined goals: organizing and mobilizing around issues, electing candidates that support those issues, and building county and state democratic parties that support those issues as well as fixing voting rights and eliminating party corporate influence.

To achieve all this we must build progressive groups across America strong enough to organize and fight back against those who "seek to use our government as a mere extension of their own affairs," as President Franklin Delano Roosevelt said (he was the Bernie of his time).

We must challenge big money in politics by taking on corporate-backed candidates in both parties -- up and down the ballot. And finally, we must take on corporate power inside the Democratic Party.

In just a few short years, we've already made a difference.

During the 2016 primary, Bernie was ridiculed for daring to challenge the power of corporate money in politics. Fast forward to 2019, when Democrats took back the House, and the For the People Act was supported unanimously by House Democrats -- as their first order of business.

We can't stop now. The stakes are incredibly high. We've got to build on our successes and elevate our Political Revolution to the next phase. And, we need your help.

[_**At Our Revolution, we know that our corrupt system runs far deeper than Donald Trump. That 's why we're committed to building the kind of mass movement necessary to create lasting, structural change. Rush a donation of whatever you can by clicking here:**_](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-july-fr?amount=27&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+At+Our+Revolution+we+know+that+our+corru&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1")

[DONATE $10 NOW](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-july-fr?recurring=auto&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+10+NOW&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1")

[DONATE $20.20 NOW](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-july-fr?recurring=auto&amount=20.20&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+2020+NOW&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1")

[DONATE $27 NOW](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-july-fr?recurring=auto&amount=27&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+27+NOW&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1")

[DONATE $50 NOW](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-july-fr?recurring=auto&amount=50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=6+-+DONATE+50+NOW&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1")

[DONATE $100 NOW](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-july-fr?recurring=auto&amount=100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=7+-+DONATE+100+NOW&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1")
Our Revolution and our allies are winning the policy war of ideas inside the Democratic Party (even though Joe Biden hasn't got the message yet). Now we need to translate that win into power that makes our government work for the people -- instead of wealthy donors.

During the first six months of 2019, we mobilized a powerful grassroots movement. We helped convince 117 House Democrats to support Medicare for All. We took on the insurance and pharmaceutical lobbies. We organized workers to fight plant closures by General Motors and other massive corporations. We fought to stop the DCCC Blacklist -- and other Democratic Party policies designed to favor establishment politicians over progressive challengers. We helped win elections up and down the ballot -- from the LA School Board to the Philadelphia City Council.

**Chip in here to help us continue to build the Political Revolution necessary to restore democracy in the United States of America** : [_**https://go.ourrevolution.com/StopAuthoritarianism**_](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-july-fr?amount=27&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=8+-++httpsgoourrevolutioncomStopAuthoritaria&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1")

In Solidarity,

Larry Cohen
Board Chair, Our Revolution

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a43a/bed43eb/ae364154/75fa228a/2533813869/VEsP/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=9+-+update+your+info&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a43a/bed43eb/ae364154/75fa22b5/2533813869/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=10+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a43a/bed43eb/ae364154/75fa22b4/2533813869/VEsHBA/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=11+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a43a/bed43eb/ae364154/75fa22b7/2533813869/VEsHBw/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=12+-+contributing+to+Our+Revolution+here&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1&source=OR_EM_FR_180DO_190724_1_1").
