name: NRCC Watch via DWS
subject: Despicable.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | While House Democrats have been hard at work safeguarding health care and keeping Trump in line, the NRCC bought online ads **_posing as Democrats_** in an attempt to divide us.

We know they'll stop at nothing to take back the House - but we didn't think they'd sink THIS low.

These ads they're running are attacking some of our most vulnerable Democrats. We need to raise **$5,000 by tomorrow at midnight in order to fight back against these attacks.[Rush a donation now. >>>](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-july-mm?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190723_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+Rush+a+donation+now+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190723_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190723_1_1")**

name: Mark Warner
subject: Still running a deficit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
With Taylor's announcement and Trump believing Virginia is "in play" for 2020, we're going to have to invest in our grassroots campaign now all the way to Election Day to keep Virginia blue.
|
---
| | Derek,

I'm writing today to ask for your help.

**Now that former Congressman Scott Taylor is officially running against me, this race has entered a new stage. The truth is, if we don 't have everyone [pitching in](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d1c2/53d9897e/5158af4b/1c8e76a7/3174743830/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-taylorrecord?refcode=20190724nd__148__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5"), we're not going to be able to keep Virginia blue.**

Jenny tells me that while 1,520 supporters pitched in to our Fight Back Fund, we missed our 2,000-donation goal -- and in a campaign this high-profile, with President Trump saying he wants to win in Virginia, that's not something we can afford.

**So I 'm reaching out to personally ask for your help. Will you make your first donation today to help us get back to where we need to be?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ name: Greg Pence
subject: Justice for 241 Marines, Sailors, and Soldiers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
On October 23, 1983, Hezbollah detonated a truck bomb outside of a Marine Corps barracks in Beirut, Lebanon. 241 Marines, Sailors, and Soldiers die [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=9df394418d5c4deea62a968618f898db&_e=bU-XVZQLhX0JMNgDH29SdAsr0sZPI1Pl0nnZGBz50cgprRDCVyTsSjky-dtJ4ekKxe9y4ZbuaFzbvaspRIowvKZ8VGrTNnhvKe_Dhl-GiH0y6BMr1NJJI3kcHevV8gEKKEpNADyH5EyrDIIo3jSJTnnv5woJ7gZA_vTBHmr_vz9Kr0InEaR_u4Rl2ZXR7nFomkOp8Elr9hLJVGbMgdZEg_ON6-Dr12uInph5VzJqDFAm3qwL9EZMQE3lw7wr0Hu-4D1okaTs43ZwsTAdBkhugRL5AFf33-_r18qjz5XkQ7zHflBF40G91a06f2eSxHEuChf2FDZJa62SzZEjFCs-rFvg34tEi0S16Q7lb2o7ZWWwliaR9kWt59uB9Qj7Fx6intyleEwo3z_Yasy1Y7rguy6adJUNjuMIQtX8Ttu-j4I%3D) Friend, On October 23, 1983, Hezbollah detonated a truck bomb outside of a Marine Corps barracks in Beirut, Lebanon.
**241 Marines, Sailors, and Soldiers died.**
I was lucky to be alive — my battalion had shipped out just 10 days before the bombing occurred. I was able to come home and see my wife and family because of the Marines who replaced me in those barracks.
_I promised I would never forget the men that died that day. _
Last week, the House passed the Our Obligation to Recognize American Heroes (OORAH) Act, finally delivering some small semblance of justice for those who lost their lives that day.
The OORAH Act makes $1.68 billion in Iranian government assets available for the families of the service-members who paid the ultimate price on October 23, 1983.
[**Spread the word about the OORAH Act >>**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=9df394418d5c4deea62a968618f898db&_e=bU-XVZQLhX0JMNgDH29SdAsr0sZPI1Pl0nnZGBz50cgprRDCVyTsSjky-dtJ4ekKxe9y4ZbuaFzbvaspRIowvKZ8VGrTNnhvKe_Dhl-GiH0y6BMr1NJJI3kcHevV8gEKKEpNADyH5EyrDIIo3jSJTnnv5woJ7gZA_vTBHmr_vz9Kr0InEaR_u4Rl2ZXR7nFomkOp8Elr9hLJVGbMgdZEg0yxR4SVi2HlVYc1CUvxxxxppR4YS2sFc5hQAkBDDL428QZSRrZ2l0nvmZAngbzdUlQsD3DarMdg5yq9lGb191c1UIT_PnMWU0iph-EVMVKiPgyS_Wkf524F9PGm08Z1t6QhtgeR8VDLwc5lDu2jtW0G8jaGgkb5hgk_kqIX8fymrMifnhuljLf15X3oYVUzM15cv-oX1uwbMr-1vB4--Cg%3D)
I’ve never been more proud of a bill and it means everything to me to fulfill my promise to never forget the Marines who died that day.
**[Please take a second and consider sharing the passage of the OORAH Act with your friends and family. ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=9df394418d5c4deea62a968618f898db&_e=bU-XVZQLhX0JMNgDH29SdAsr0sZPI1Pl0nnZGBz50cgprRDCVyTsSjky-dtJ4ekKxe9y4ZbuaFzbvaspRIowvKZ8VGrTNnhvKe_Dhl-GiH0y6BMr1NJJI3kcHevV8gEKKEpNADyH5EyrDIIo3jSJTnnv5woJ7gZA_vTBHmr_vz9Kr0InEaR_u4Rl2ZXR7nFomkOp8Elr9hLJVGbMgdZEgxsxFCTi00t_AT91GR_QBPlnN4GstSCD4nbM1-Rh9tMOJtvSeJJQX8MjYtsW9vII5_G_E4czuecAF7MZNHwIXSdCREQpfJpNvz3EEgGFLFgHAV7n5CAz-ipJYHhvkvIjGmEZ9fHPS6ABRn51KrTZRVPM2ew7e4zbKC5qaCmKBczoTlTOQDaUUCnihyBsoCzD7CPxQLzq02f_TQiYQuCZMPs%3D)** [ **Share** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=9df394418d5c4deea62a968618f898db&_e=bU-XVZQLhX0JMNgDH29SdAsr0sZPI1Pl0nnZGBz50cgprRDCVyTsSjky-dtJ4ekKxe9y4ZbuaFzbvaspRIowvKZ8VGrTNnhvKe_Dhl-GiH0y6BMr1NJJI3kcHevV8gEKKEpNADyH5EyrDIIo3jSJTnnv5woJ7gZA_vTBHmr_vz9Kr0InEaR_u4Rl2ZXR7nFomkOp8Elr9hLJVGbMgdZEg-6qoz_OzsAF7w5cbNVhvTEVnVKZBet2tovzhkP6LpDp5zlZHGxs39qfH2mhcLYz_COXuTw-HwAoEe6bXmceL6740Yls65AdlbCPw5R9oHnGS5J9A1efzCC4Aod53XXqKiKtNfjX5bkNMF0XtCtYNvf38o5kw9iWqNIM97OBKb3PE3XTAewcr7nR4B1e2GTLXglRHV1uJPUQpeOwKLvsra8%3D) Semper Fi, Greg Pence | |

name: Campaign Update
subject: we are up against two major challenges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
As Election Day draws closer, this campaign just keeps building momentum! The Cook Political Report says the race is a toss-up, so everyone from our field staff to Andy's former primary opponents have
|
---

| | Peter,

As Election Day draws closer, this campaign just keeps building momentum! **The _Cook Political Report_ says the race is a toss-up**, so everyone from our field staff to Andy's former primary opponents have been working their tails off on the trail -- and it's paying off.

But there are less than four months to go, and we are up against two major challenges:
1. **Bevin 's deep-pocketed allies are already spending a _ton_ of money to blunt our momentum.** They went up with vicious attack ads the day after the primary election, and they're surely planning even more.
2. Matt Bevin personally loaned his campaign $2 million, and there's plenty more where that came from.

Matt Bevin is clearly running scared. And he's relying on his big money, special-interest backers, and his own personal fortune to bail him out.

We don't need to match Bevin's self-funding dollar for dollar, but running a winning campaign is going to take _a lot_ of resources. Andy isn't a multimillionaire with billionaire buddies -- that's why we need **every member of this grassroots team** to pitch in what they can if Andy's going to win!

**So will you make a donation today to help us get it done?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| Hello - Mueller's testimony today is a stark reminder that Russia attacked our elections to help elect Donald Trump, the president is NOT exonerated of obstruction of justice, and the Republican Party has no interest in investigating either of these important truths.

_**[The work starts now to take back the White House and the Senate Majority. Will you pitch in $27 or more to help Ed Markey organize Democrats for victory?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-2020-victory?refcode=EM-072419_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Begin Forward from Ed Markey:

_**[We need a Democratic president in 2020. We need to take back the Senate majority. Our work to deliver both cannot wait any longer. Pitch in now and help us deliver a Democratic victory.](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-2020-victory?refcode=EM-072419_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ Hello,

Today, former Special Counsel Robert Muller is reiterating two important truths before Congress:

> 1) Russian meddling in our elections deserves the attention of every American.
>

But what you are hearing from Republicans in Congress is that the "case is closed."

Republicans in Congress have no interest in preventing future Russian meddling in our elections.

And they have no interest in holding President Trump accountable for his actions.

**If we 're going to restore the soul of our Democracy, we must lay the groundwork now for a Democratic victory in 2020.**

When we have a Democratic nominee next year, they will need to hit the ground running with grassroots Democrats already organized to win. It's time to turn our outrage into action to defeat President Trump.

name: Steve Chabot
subject: A Story that Got Ignored Last Week
body:
A Story that Got Ignored Last Week No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jiulluz-kujkulhluu-v/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiulluz-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiulluz-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [A Story that Got Ignored Last Week](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiulluz-kujkulhluu-j/)
Last week, the news got consumed by one story - President Trump's ongoing battle with four Democratic Congresswomen. As a result of this media frenzy, there were other important matters that got no coverage whatsoever - that you probably never even heard about. I'd like to tell you about one of those things, that really mattered to a too-often overlooked segment of our country.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiulluz-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiulluz-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [S](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiulluz-kujkulhluu-d/)[omething Different](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiulluz-kujkulhluu-h/)
I'm going to do something a little different this week. As you know, I usually find some topic, or event, or issue, that I think is timely, and interesting, and write about it. This week I'm asking you to read something published over the weekend in the Cincinnati Enquirer.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiulluz-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiulluz-kujkulhluu-u/)
### [Are We Losing Our Country?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiulluz-kujkulhluu-o/)
President Trump once declared that a country without borders is not really a country anymore. And he was right. And that's just what seems to be rapidly happening to the greatest country this world has ever known.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiulluz-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiulluz-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [Did the Democrats Just Re-Elect President Trump at Their Debates Last Week?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiulluz-kujkulhluu-p/)
It is my humble opinion, that the Democrats, in their very first debate last week, went a considerable way towards re-electing President Trump in the upcoming 2020 election. I'm on the blog talking about it today.

Click the link below to read more. name: tinaforminnesota.com
subject: A brief note about Mueller's testimony today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Please read this tonight.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190724_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, Earlier today, Special Counsel Robert Mueller testified before Congress about the Trump campaign's relationship with Russia and foreign interference in our elections.

In his testimony, Mueller pointed to the growing threat of foreign meddling, saying he fears it is the "new normal."

**But despite consistent warnings about continued interference, many of our own elected officials are failing to take action. The U.S. House has passed legislation -- but Senate Republicans _blocked_ a bill that would increase the security of our elections.**

**[Tina's calling on Congress to pass legislation to protect our electoral system from foreign interference -- and we're asking you to stand with her. Will you add your name right now and be one of 5,000 signers by midnight tonight?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4e2c6/c1f7015/65514253/1146ab5f/1130208194/VEsE/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/protect-our-electoral-system?source=rtw_20190724_em&recurring=auto")** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4e2c6/c1f7015/65514253/1146ab5f/1130208194/VEsF/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/protect-our-electoral-system?source=rtw_20190724_em&recurring=auto")** We know Russia worked to interfere in the 2016 election. If we don't put pressure on Congress to take bold action here, we're risking continued foreign interference -- and we can't let that happen.

Fighting with you,
Team Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190724_em-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4e2c6/c1f7015/65514253/1146ab51/1130208194/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: Today on Capitol Hill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Earlier today, John weighed in in response to the testimony of Robert Mueller on Capitol Hill. We wanted to make sure you didn't miss his thoughts on this pivotal day. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172c/691c9bd/6ec9d4b3/11a4667e/3206669800/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend: Earlier today, John weighed in in response to the testimony of Robert Mueller on Capitol Hill. We wanted to make sure you didn't miss his thoughts on this pivotal day.

[**_Read his note, then chip in to help us keep growing our campaign so we can end Donald Trump's presidency in 2020._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_TH_20190724-fr-TH-muellertopper-nop_nop_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,
Team Hickenlooper

\--------------------------

**Sender:** John Hickenlooper
**Subject:** Happening right now:
**Date:** Wed July 24, 2019 at 2:21 PM

Friend: As I send this, Robert Mueller is finishing his testimony on Capitol Hill about his findings regarding Russian interference into the 2016 elections--and Donald Trump's potential involvement in that interference.

But here's the bigger picture: _We have still not resolved many of the vulnerabilities that left us open to interference in 2016._ And Donald Trump has not taken steps to meet or even _acknowledge_ this challenge.

**It 's absolutely critical that in 2020, we elect leaders who will take these threats to our democracy seriously--and as our next President, I plan to meet them head on. Chip in to help me build the campaign that can win in 2020:**
****[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_TH_20190724-fr-TH-muellertopper-nop_nop_b1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_TH_20190724-fr-TH-muellertopper-nop_nop_b5&recurring=auto&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_TH_20190724-fr-TH-muellertopper-nop_nop_b25&recurring=auto&amount=25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_TH_20190724-fr-TH-muellertopper-nop_nop_b50&recurring=auto&amount=50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_TH_20190724-fr-TH-muellertopper-nop_nop_b100&recurring=auto&amount=100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_TH_20190724-fr-TH-muellertopper-nop_nop_bother&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** Mueller's testimony is important, but it is not sufficient.

I'm here to say: we need to think bigger than that. Securing our elections and rehabilitating our democracy won't happen in one five-hour hearing. It has to be a long-term, sustained, unending effort--which, yes, starts with making Donald a one-term president in November 2020.

[**_Chip in to help make it happen._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_TH_20190724-fr-TH-muellertopper-nop_nop_l2&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,
John ****** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190724_TH_20190724-fr-TH-muellertopper-nop_nop_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")********

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172c/691c9bd/6ec9d4b3/11a46675/3206669800/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172c/691c9bd/6ec9d4b3/11a46672/3206669800/VEsHBg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172c/691c9bd/6ec9d4b3/11a46673/3206669800/VEsHAQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172c/691c9bd/6ec9d4b3/11a46670/3206669800/VEsHAA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172c/691c9bd/6ec9d4b3/11a46671/3206669800/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172c/691c9bd/6ec9d4b3/11a46674/3206669800/VEsHAg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").
